coordinate_alignment_to_baseline_vector.alignment_kind: same ordered baseline vector sample index set

derivation_source_or_model_definition.surface_mass_density_rule: sigma_i = rho_water * h_i where h_i is liquid-water-equivalent thickness in meters

physical_interpretation_boundary: derived surface mass density from observed LWE baseline only
not an independent predictive DFM-MKC model
requires a fresh comparison run before any result interpretation
